    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <RelativeDistanceCondition freespace="true" relativeDistanceType="longitudinal" value="$_triggerDist" rule="lessOrEqual" entityRef="Target" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: If the parameter LightingConditions is Night, then
code:
<Condition name="NightCondition" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByValueCondition>
    <ParameterCondition parameterRef="LightingConditions" rule="equalTo" value="Night" />
  </ByValueCondition>
</Condition>

description: When the relative speed difference is 2m/s
code:
<Condition name="StopAtSameSpeed" delay="0" conditionEdge="rising">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Target" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <RelativeSpeedCondition value="2" rule="greaterThan" entityRef="Ego" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: If the parameter is 60
code:
<Condition name="Ego_speed_exceeds" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByValueCondition>
    <ParameterCondition parameterRef="Ego_speed_kph" rule="greaterThan" value="60" />
  </ByValueCondition>
</Condition>

description: If the parameter is 60
code:
<Condition name="Target_speed_exceeds" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByValueCondition>
    <ParameterCondition parameterRef="Target_final_speed_kph" rule="greaterThan" value="60" />
  </ByValueCondition>
</Condition>

description: If it moves ${$_Ego_syncS+$Ego_length}m
code:
<Condition name="StopPastTarget" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <TraveledDistanceCondition value="${$_Ego_syncS+$Ego_length}" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: If it goes to $_Target_initDistm
code:
<Condition name="StopAfterTraveledDistance" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">

    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <TraveledDistanceCondition value="$_Target_initDist" />
    </EntityCondition>

description: If it drives a total of $_Ego_TurnSignalActivationSm
code:
<Condition name="IntersectionReachedS" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>

description: When Ego heading angle is 1.571rad
code:
<Condition name="EgoHeadingReached" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <AngleCondition angleTolerance="0.01" angleType="heading" angle="1.571" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: When the preceding action 'TurnSignalOn_Act' has completed
code:

  </ByValueCondition>
</Condition>

description: When the step of the 'Target_Teleport' event is completed
code:

description: If the parameter isTargetbraking is true
code:

description: If Ego is faster than Target by -1m/s or less
code:
<Condition name="StopWhenBelowTargetSpeed" delay="1" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <RelativeSpeedCondition value="-1" rule="lessThan" entityRef="Target" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: When narrowed down to Target and ${$Ego_initTimeHeadway*$_Ego_speed}m or more
code:
<Condition name="StopPastTarget" delay="0" conditionEdge="none">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <RelativeDistanceCondition freespace="true" relativeDistanceType="longitudinal" value="${$Ego_initTimeHeadway*$_Ego_speed}" rule="greaterThan" entityRef="Target" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: If it drives a total of ${$VRU_initS-$_Ego_initS+5}m,
code:

</Condition>

description: If it collides with $collidingEntity
code:

    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <CollisionCondition>
        <EntityRef entityRef="$collidingEntity" />
      </CollisionCondition>
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

description: When ego speed is more than ${$egoSpeed*0.98}m/s
code:

    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <SpeedCondition value="${$egoSpeed*0.98}" rule="greaterThan" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>

  </ByValueCondition>

description: When more than ${($TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LongitudinalOffset_m / ($Ego_InitSpeed_Ve0_kph / 3.6)) + 10.0} seconds have passed since start.
code:

description: When the headway time from TargetBlocking is ${sqrt( $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m * $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m ) / ($TargetBlocking_Speed_kph / 3.6)} seconds
code:
<Condition name="CrossStartCondition" delay="0" conditionEdge="rising">
  <ByEntityCondition>
    <TriggeringEntities triggeringEntitiesRule="any">
      <EntityRef entityRef="Ego" />
    </TriggeringEntities>
    <EntityCondition>
      <TimeHeadwayCondition entityRef="TargetBlocking" value="${sqrt( $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m * $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m ) / ($TargetBlocking_Speed_kph / 3.6)}" freespace="true" rule="lessThan" coordinateSystem="road" relativeDistanceType="longitudinal" />
    </EntityCondition>
  </ByEntityCondition>
</Condition>
